subcodes.first_line: O Munir! When the radiant effulgence of the Revelation struck Mount Sinai's summit, the adamantine rock was shattered and the impenetrable crag obliterated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منیر پرتو ظهور چون بر قله طور زد سنگ خارا متلاشی شد و صخره صماء متفانی
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
